recommendations.title: Every Day
recommendations.overview: 16-year old Rhiannon falls in love with a mysterious spirit named “A” that inhabits a different body every day. Feeling an unmatched connection, Rhiannon and “A” work each day to find each other, not knowing what the next day will bring.

recommendations.title: Sir
recommendations.overview: A prosperous young Indian man falls in love with his servant, a widow with the dream of becoming a fashion designer.

recommendations.title: The Spirit of Christmas
recommendations.overview: A woman falls in love with a man who is somewhat unavailable.

recommendations.title: A Mermaid in Paris
recommendations.overview: A man rescues a mermaid in Paris and slowly falls in love with her.

recommendations.title: Bird People
recommendations.overview: An overstressed American businessman and a French chambermaid make a connection at an airport hotel in Paris.

recommendations.title: Above the Shadows
recommendations.overview: A young woman who has faded to the point of becoming invisible must find her way back with the help of the one man who can see her.

recommendations.title: Lady Chatterley's Lover
recommendations.overview: After a crippling injury leaves her husband impotent, Lady Chatterly is torn between her love for her husband and her physical desires. With her husband's consent, she seeks out other means of fulfilling her needs.

recommendations.title: The Shape of Water
recommendations.overview: An other-worldly story, set against the backdrop of Cold War era America circa 1962, where a mute janitor working at a lab falls in love with an amphibious man being held captive there and devises a plan to help him escape.

recommendations.title: Lady Chatterley
recommendations.overview: After a crippling injury leaves her husband impotent, Lady Chatterly is torn between her love for her husband and her physical desires. With her husband's consent, she seeks out other means of fulfilling her needs.

recommendations.title: Silent Light
recommendations.overview: Johan and his family are Mennonites from the north of Mexico. Against the law of God and Man, Johan falls in love with another woman.
